languages.text: "Какая честь их явление, Ваша Светлость! Когда-то {g|Encyclopedia:AugmentationGlossary}аугментации{/g} спасли {g|Encyclopedia:MerovPenalLegionGlossary}меровцев{/g}, явив мощь Адептус Механикус и даров Омниссии. Позвольте техножрецам продемонстрировать ее вновь".

traits.locale_text: "Какая честь их явление, Ваша Светлость! Когда-то {g|Encyclopedia:AugmentationGlossary}аугментации{/g} спасли {g|Encyclopedia:MerovPenalLegionGlossary}меровцев{/g}, явив мощь Адептус Механикус и даров Омниссии. Позвольте техножрецам продемонстрировать ее вновь".

languages.text: "Their coming is such an honour, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}! {g|Encyclopedia:AugmentationGlossary}Augmentations{/g} saved the {g|Encyclopedia:MerovPenalLegionGlossary}Merovians{/g} once before, revealing the might of the Adeptus Mechanicus and the gifts of the Omnissiah. Allow the Tech-Priests to demonstrate their power again."
languages.original_text: "Какая честь их явление, Ваша Светлость! Когда-то {g|Encyclopedia:AugmentationGlossary}аугментации{/g} спасли {g|Encyclopedia:MerovPenalLegionGlossary}меровцев{/g}, явив мощь Адептус Механикус и даров Омниссии. Позвольте техножрецам продемонстрировать ее вновь".

traits.locale_text: "Their coming is such an honour, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}! Augmentations saved the Merovians once before, revealing the might of the Adeptus Mechanicus and the gifts of the Omnissiah. Allow the Tech-Priests to demonstrate their power again."

"Their coming is such an honour, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}! Augmentations saved the Merovians once before, revealing the might of the Adeptus Mechanicus and the gifts of the Omnissiah. Allow the Tech-Priests to demonstrate their power again."

"Their coming is such an honour, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}! Augmentations saved the Merovians once before, revealing the might of the Adeptus Mechanicus and the gifts of the Omnissiah. Allow the Tech-Priests to demonstrate their power again."

languages.text: 「彼らの到来は、まさに栄誉です、貴{mf|殿|女}様！増援は、かつてメロヴィンを救ったことがあります。それは、帝国技術局の力と、機械神の贈り物です。テクプリストが、再びその力を示すことを許してください」
languages.original_text: "Their coming is such an honour, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}! Augmentations saved the Merovians once before, revealing the might of the Adeptus Mechanicus and the gifts of the Omnissiah. Allow the Tech-Priests to demonstrate their power again."

traits.locale_text: 「彼らの到来は、まさに栄誉です、貴{mf|殿|女}様！増援は、かつて merovians を救ったことがあります。それは、Adeptus Mechanicus の力と、Omnissiah の贈り物です。テクプリストが、再びその力を示すことを許してください。」

languages.text: «¡Su presencia será un honor, mi{mf|lord|lady}! Los {g|Encyclopedia:AugmentationGlossary}aumentos{/g} ya salvaron a los {g|Encyclopedia:MerovPenalLegionGlossary}merovianos{/g} una vez, lo que nos demostró el poder del Adeptus Mechanicus y los dones del Omnissiah. Permita que sus tecnosacerdotes vuelvan a demostrar sus capacidades».
languages.original_text: "Their coming is such an honour, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}! {g|Encyclopedia:AugmentationGlossary}Augmentations{/g} saved the {g|Encyclopedia:MerovPenalLegionGlossary}Merovians{/g} once before, revealing the might of the Adeptus Mechanicus and the gifts of the Omnissiah. Allow the Tech-Priests to demonstrate their power again."

traits.locale_text: «¡Su presencia será un honor, mi{mf|lord|lady}! Los {g|Encyclopedia:AugmentationGlossary}aumentos{/g} ya salvaron a los {g|Encyclopedia:MerovPenalLegionGlossary}merovianos{/g} una vez, lo que nos demostró el poder del Adeptus Mechanicus y los dones del Omnissiah. Permita que sus tecnosacerdotes vuelvan a demostrar sus capacidades».

languages.text: “这是何等的荣耀啊，大人！昔日，正是{g|Encyclopedia:AugmentationGlossary}植入物改造{/g}拯救了{g|Encyclopedia:MerovPenalLegionGlossary}梅罗夫人{/g}，彰显了机械修会的伟力与欧姆尼赛亚的恩典。请允许技术神甫们再次展现他们的权能吧。”
languages.original_text: "Their coming is such an honour, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}! {g|Encyclopedia:AugmentationGlossary}Augmentations{/g} saved the {g|Encyclopedia:MerovPenalLegionGlossary}Merovians{/g} once before, revealing the might of the Adeptus Mechanicus and the gifts of the Omnissiah. Allow the Tech-Priests to demonstrate their power again."

traits.locale_text: “这是何等的荣耀啊，{mf|Lordship|Ladyship}！昔日，正是{g|Encyclopedia:AugmentationGlossary}植入物改造{/g}拯救了{g|Encyclopedia:MerovPenalLegionGlossary}梅罗夫人{/g}，彰显了机械修会的伟力与欧姆尼赛亚的恩典。请允许技术神甫们再次展现他们的权能吧。”

languages.text: "Ihr Kommen ist eine große Ehre, Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft}! {g|Encyclopedia:AugmentationGlossary}Augmentationen{/g} haben die {g|Encyclopedia:MerovPenalLegionGlossary}Merovianer{/g} schon einmal gerettet und dabei die Macht des Adeptus Mechanicus und die Gaben des Omnissiah offenbart. Erlaubt den Techpriestern, ihre Macht erneut unter Beweis zu stellen."
languages.original_text: "Their coming is such an honour, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}! {g|Encyclopedia:AugmentationGlossary}Augmentations{/g} saved the {g|Encyclopedia:MerovPenalLegionGlossary}Merovians{/g} once before, revealing the might of the Adeptus Mechanicus and the gifts of the Omnissiah. Allow the Tech-Priests to demonstrate their power again."

traits.locale_text: "Ihr Kommen ist eine große Ehre, Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft}! {g|Encyclopedia:AugmentationGlossary}Augmentationen{/g} haben die {g|Encyclopedia:MerovPenalLegionGlossary}Merovianer{/g} schon einmal gerettet und dabei die Macht des Adeptus Mechanicus und die Gaben des Omnissiah offenbart. Erlaubt den Techpriestern, ihre Macht erneut unter Beweis zu stellen."

languages.text: "Kendisinin gelişi ne büyük bir şeref {mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri! Adeptus Mechanicus'un kudretini ve Hermesih'in armağanlarını ortaya koyan {g|Encyclopedia:AugmentationGlossary}ogmentasyonlar{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:MerovPenalLegionGlossary}Merovluları{/g} daha önce bir kez kurtarmıştı. Tekno Rahiplerin güçlerini tekrar göstermelerine izin verin."
languages.original_text: "Their coming is such an honour, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}! {g|Encyclopedia:AugmentationGlossary}Augmentations{/g} saved the {g|Encyclopedia:MerovPenalLegionGlossary}Merovians{/g} once before, revealing the might of the Adeptus Mechanicus and the gifts of the Omnissiah. Allow the Tech-Priests to demonstrate their power again."

traits.locale_text: "Kendisinin gelişi ne büyük bir şeref {mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri! Adeptus Mechanicus'un kudretini ve Hermesih'in armağanlarını ortaya koyan {g|Encyclopedia:AugmentationGlossary}ogmentasyonlar{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:MerovPenalLegionGlossary}Merovluları{/g} daha önce bir kez kurtarmıştı. Tekno Rahiplerin güçlerini tekrar göstermelerine izin verin."

languages.text: « Leur venue est un immense honneur, Votre Seigneurie ! Les {g|Encyclopedia:AugmentationGlossary}augmentations{/g} ont déjà sauvé les {g|Encyclopedia:MerovPenalLegionGlossary}Meroviens{/g} par le passé, témoignant de la puissance de l'Adeptus Mechanicus et des dons de l'Omnimessie. Permettez aux technoprêtres de faire montre de leur pouvoir une nouvelle fois. »
languages.original_text: "Their coming is such an honour, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}! {g|Encyclopedia:AugmentationGlossary}Augmentations{/g} saved the {g|Encyclopedia:MerovPenalLegionGlossary}Merovians{/g} once before, revealing the might of the Adeptus Mechanicus and the gifts of the Omnissiah. Allow the Tech-Priests to demonstrate their power again."

traits.locale_text: « Leur venue est un immense honneur, Votre Seigneurie ! Les {g|Encyclopedia:AugmentationGlossary}augmentations{/g} ont déjà sauvé les {g|Encyclopedia:MerovPenalLegionGlossary}Meroviens{/g} par le passé, témoignant de la puissance de l'Adeptus Mechanicus et des dons de l'Omnimessie. Permettez aux technoprêtres de faire montre de leur pouvoir une nouvelle fois. »
